title: murdannia elata
intro: Murdannia elata, also known as the Blue Sword or Blue Flag Lilyturf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Southeast Asia, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is often prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and powder. Murdannia elata is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antiviral properties, and is sometimes employed in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds.
